title: Mozart – Music of the Heart – Ages 6–8

hunks.text: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart was a BOY who loved MUSIC. He was born a long time ago in Austria. Mozart's FAMILY helped him learn to play the PIANO and the VIOLIN. When Mozart was very little, he could already play beautiful SONGS. His MOTHER and FATHER were so proud of him.

questions.question: What instruments did Mozart learn to play?
Where was Mozart born?
Name someone in Mozart's family who helped him.
Imagine you hear Mozart play the violin. What do the sounds make you feel?

hunks.text: Mozart wrote MUSIC when he was still a young BOY. He could write down notes so other people could play his songs. Even though Mozart was small, he had BIG ideas about MUSIC. His brain worked very FAST and he loved to CREATE new songs every DAY. People everywhere wanted to hear what Mozart would write next.

questions.question: What did Mozart do when he was a young boy?
How fast did Mozart's brain work?
What is a musical note?
If you could write a song right now, what would it be about?

hunks.text: Mozart's MUSIC sounds HAPPY and SWEET. When you LISTEN to Mozart's songs, your HEART might feel warm and good. Some of his most BEAUTIFUL songs are called concertos. A concerto is MUSIC where one INSTRUMENT plays the main part and others play around it. Mozart wrote concertos for the PIANO and for the VIOLIN.

questions.question: How does Mozart's music sound?
What does listening to Mozart's music make your heart feel?
Name one thing the text says about Mozart's music.
questions.answer: SOUNDS HAPPY / SOUNDS SWEET / MAKES YOUR HEART FEEL WARM

questions.question: Close your eyes and imagine hearing Mozart play a piano concerto. What do you hear?
questions.answer: BEAUTIFUL SOUNDS / SOFT MUSIC / LOVELY NOTES

hunks.text: Mozart worked very HARD his whole LIFE. He traveled to many places to play MUSIC for KINGS and QUEENS. They loved his SONGS so much. Mozart never stopped writing. He wrote hundreds of pieces of MUSIC before he died. Even now, over two hundred years later, people all around the WORLD still play Mozart's MUSIC.

questions.question: Who did Mozart play music for?
How much did Mozart work?
Do people today still listen to Mozart's music?
Name a place Mozart traveled.

hunks.text: One of Mozart's most FAMOUS songs is called "Eine kleine Nachtmusik." That is a German NAME. In English, it means "A Little Night MUSIC." This PIECE is SHORT, SWEET, and very PRETTY. People play it at weddings and special parties. When you HEAR it, you might want to DANCE or SMILE.

questions.question: What language is "Eine kleine Nachtmusik"?
What does "Eine kleine Nachtmusik" mean in English?
Name something people do when they hear this Mozart song.
Imagine you hear "Eine kleine Nachtmusik" at a party. What do your feet want to do?

hunks.text: Mozart's MUSIC teaches us that LOVE and JOY can come from ART. Even though Mozart lived long ago, his SONGS still TOUCH people's HEARTS today. When you LISTEN to Mozart, you are hearing the LOVE he put into his WORK. His MUSIC shows us that when we CREATE things with our HEART, other people can FEEL it.

questions.question: What does Mozart's music teach us about?
What do people feel when they listen to Mozart?
What is art?
How do you feel inside when you hear beautiful music?

hunks.text: Mozart wrote MUSIC in many different STYLES. He wrote SONGS called operas where people SING long stories. He wrote PIECES for orchestras, which are BIG groups of MUSICIANS. He wrote MUSIC for churches and MUSIC for DANCE. Mozart could write MUSIC for anything, and it was always BEAUTIFUL.

questions.question: Name one style of music Mozart wrote.
questions.answer: OPERAS / ORCHESTRAS / CHURCH MUSIC / DANCE MUSIC

questions.question: What is an orchestra?
Was Mozart's music always beautiful?
Picture an orchestra playing Mozart. What do you see and hear?
questions.answer: LOTS OF MUSICIANS / BEAUTIFUL SOUNDS / MANY INSTRUMENTS

hunks.text: You can LISTEN to Mozart's MUSIC anytime you want. Some people PLAY Mozart when they need to FEEL CALM. STUDENTS listen to Mozart when they study because it helps them THINK. FAMILIES play Mozart during DINNER or BEDTIME. Mozart's MUSIC is a GIFT to the WORLD. When you HEAR Mozart, you are part of something very SPECIAL that has made people HAPPY for hundreds of YEARS.

questions.question: Name a time when people listen to Mozart's music.
questions.answer: WHEN THEY STUDY / AT DINNER / AT BEDTIME / WHEN THEY NEED TO FEEL CALM

questions.question: What does Mozart's music help students do?
Why might listening to music help you feel happy?
Would you like to listen to Mozart? Why or why not?

citations: Shaffer, Peter. Amadeus. Broadway Play, 1979. Historical drama depicting Mozart's life and music.
Einstein, Alfred. Mozart: His Character, His Work. Oxford University Press, 1945. Scholarly biography of Mozart's compositions and life.
Britannica Encyclopedia. Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart. https://www.britannica.com/biography/Wolfgang-Amadeus-Mozart. Verified biographical and musical facts.
